hero.subtitle: From SEO to AI, from websites to performance ads — we deliver 9 end-to-end digital services under one roof. Focus on growing your business while the masters handle your digital.
hero.supportingLine: Trusted by 50+ clients across 8 industries since 2018. AI-leveraged workflows deliver 3x faster than conventional agencies — with the same premium Jakarta tier quality.
hero.trustBadge: No minimum contracts · No hidden costs · Free 60-minute strategy session

manifesto.title: An agency that gets business,
manifesto.titleHighlight: not just one that sells services.
manifesto.p1: Para Suhu Digital was born from a simple observation: too many agencies in Indonesia make sweet promises upfront, only to fumble the delivery. Projects drag on, communication disappears, results fall short of expectations — and the client always pays the price.
manifesto.p2: We believe digital marketing isn't about momentary tricks or growth hacks. It's about consistent systems, disciplined execution, and strategy that genuinely connects with business goals. That's what sets us apart.
manifesto.p3: By combining senior-level strategy with modern AI workflows, we deliver the quality of tier-1 Jakarta agencies at speeds and prices that still make sense — whether you're a bootstrapped startup or a corporation in scaling mode.

servicesGrid.title: 9 Master Services,
servicesGrid.intro: Need a website that converts? Done. Ads with proven ROAS? Done. A mobile app that sticks on users' phones? Done. Need to clean up your brand's reputation on Google? Absolutely. Pick what you need — or take everything and let us become your strategic digital partner.

highlights.title: End-to-end coverage
highlights.desc: Strategy, design, development, marketing, and maintenance — one point of coordination.

highlights.title: Senior-led delivery
highlights.desc: Every project is supervised by a founder or senior strategist — not a trial-and-error junior.

highlights.title: Transparent pricing
highlights.desc: Clear tiers, detailed scope, no hidden costs. Flexible contracts starting from 1 month.

servicesGrid.ctaText: Not sure which one fits your business?
servicesGrid.ctaHighlight: Let's discuss first — free, no commitment.

whyUs.title: Many agencies in Indonesia.
whyUs.subtitle: We don't take on every project that walks through the door. We choose clients we can genuinely impact, and we deliver to a standard we refuse to compromise. These four principles back our results guarantee.

reasons.title: Fast without quality compromise
reasons.description: Projects that typically take 3 months, we finish in 3 weeks. Not because we rush — but because our internal workflows are automated with premium AI tools. Quality control stays manual, owned by senior strategists.

reasons.title: AI-leveraged, master-driven
reasons.description: We use AI for execution (research, content production, automation), but strategy and critical decisions stay with humans. The result: working like a team of 10x with senior-level output.

reasons.title: Founders hands-on, not just sales talk
reasons.description: You talk directly to the people doing the work — not an account manager who has to 'check with the technical team'. Direct communication, fast decisions, no telephone-game scope creep.

reasons.title: Pay for results, not promises
reasons.description: We're transparent about targets and deliverables. If we miss a milestone, there's real accountability — not lengthy excuses. Performance-based contracts available for Suhu Ads and SEO clients.

whyUs.footnote: Want to first check if your project fits our way of working? Initial 30-60 minute discussion, free.

industries.title: Specialists in
industries.intro: Each industry has different consumer behavior, regulations, and marketing playbooks. Rather than being a shallow generalist, we've chosen to go deep in these 8 industries — with concrete portfolios, case studies, and battle-tested keyword research.
industries.moreSoon: Your industry isn't here? We can still work together — we're used to onboarding new industries with deep upfront research.

process.title: Master process,
process.subtitle: We don't like projects that drag, communication that gets tangled, or results that aren't clear. These four stages keep clients calm from kickoff to launch — and beyond.

steps.title: Discovery & Discussion
steps.desc: We talk about your business, targets, current state, and competitors. Free 30-60 minutes via Zoom or in person at our BSD/Bintaro office. No obligation, no hard selling.

steps.title: Proposal & Roadmap
steps.desc: You get a complete proposal: detailed scope, weekly timeline, deliverables per milestone, transparent pricing. Including assumptions, risks, and exit clauses — everything in black and white.

steps.title: Execution in Master Mode
steps.desc: We work with AI-leveraged workflows. Weekly progress updates via Notion + WhatsApp group, access to staging environments, and weekly sync calls. You'll never feel left in the dark.

steps.title: Launch & Optimize
steps.desc: After launch, we don't disappear. 30-day bug-fix warranty, optional maintenance retainer, and scaling options for the next phase. We invest long-term with serious clients.

approach.title: Not AI replacing humans.
approach.intro: Since 2024, we've been seriously exploring how AI can transform the way agencies work. The result: it doesn't reduce quality — it multiplies capacity. This is the methodology that sets us apart.

pillars.title: 10x faster research
pillars.desc: Keyword research, competitor analysis, audience mapping — what used to take a week now takes a day. We use a premium AI stack (Claude, GPT-5, Perplexity Pro, custom scrapers) to dig deeper than average agencies.

pillars.title: Production at scale
pillars.desc: A 30-day social media content batch, 10 landing page variants for A/B testing, or 50 creative versions for Meta Ads — ready in days, not months. Always with manual editorial review.

pillars.title: Humans still decide
pillars.desc: Strategy, brand voice, pricing, and critical decisions — always held by senior strategists. AI is a tool, not a replacement. That's why our output is consistent — not generic AI-slop.

pillars.title: Automation that helps clients
pillars.desc: We also implement AI on the client side: context-aware CS chatbots, operational workflow automation, self-explanatory analytics dashboards. Your business becomes efficient — not just well-branded.

faq.title: Questions clients
faq.subtitle: Before consultation, clients usually have these questions. We answer them openly here — so you can assess whether we fit your needs.

items.q: How long does a project typically take at Para Suhu?
items.a: Depends on scope: landing pages 2-3 weeks, company profiles 3-4 weeks, e-commerce 4-8 weeks, custom software/apps 8-16 weeks, ad campaigns can launch within 7 days, SEO results start showing 3-6 months. Detailed timelines are broken down per milestone in our proposals.

items.q: Does Para Suhu work with clients outside Jakarta?
items.a: Yes, 100%. Our team is Jakarta-based (HQ at IDX Tower, with plans for BSD office and Bintaro home office by 2027), but 60% of our clients are from outside Jakarta — Surabaya, Bandung, Bali, Medan, even Singapore. Our workflow is remote-first with proven tooling.

Depends on the project type. One-time projects (website, app, software): 50% deposit, 30% mid-project, 20% before launch. Retainer projects (SEO, Ads, Socmed): monthly with a 3-month minimum contract. All via corporate bank transfer with formal invoices and NPWP. Custom payment terms available for corporate clients.

Of course. We regularly work with tier-1 corporate clients who have strict legal requirements. Mutual NDAs are available before in-depth discussions. Client source code, data, and strategies are never shared with third parties — including being used as case studies without written consent.

items.q: What if we're not satisfied with the results?
items.a: Every project has milestone reviews. If concerns arise mid-project, we revisit scope and adjust. For development projects, there's a free 30-day post-launch bug-fix warranty. For Ads & SEO, contracts are flexible monthly — you can stop anytime with 30 days notice, no penalty.

items.q: How big is the Para Suhu team?
items.a: Currently, we're a lean senior team with extensive AI workflows. Every project is led by a founder or senior strategist who's hands-on. For larger executions, we partner with a network of pre-vetted specialist freelancers. You'll never get handed off to a 'fresh-out-of-college junior account executive'.

items.q: Do you work with sensitive industries (like online gaming, finance)?
items.a: Yes. We have specialized playbooks for industries with strict regulatory or platform policy constraints — online gaming (Meta/Google policy), finance (OJK), clinics (BPOM, medical licensing), education (Ministry of Education). Our team understands compliance, not just growth-at-all-cost.

items.q: Can all deliverables be in English?
items.a: Yes. Websites, applications, documentation, and reporting are available in 2 languages (ID/EN) by default. For clients with international stakeholders, we regularly deliver bilingual or English-only output with native-level copywriters.

faq.footer: Have another question? Just send us a WhatsApp or email — we usually respond within 2 working hours.
